name: Crock Pot Stuffed Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the top off and remove seeds from 6 green peppers (select tall rather than wide ones so that the pepper cavity is large enough).
2. Combine: 1 pound ground beef or ground turkey, 1/3 cup uncooked rice, 1 onion (diced), salt, and pepper to taste.
Any other seasonings you prefer (oregano, parsley, garlic powder, etc.) can be added as desired.
3. Stuff each pepper about 2/3 full with the meat and rice mixture (rice will need room to swell up).
4. Stand the peppers side-by-side in the slow cooker. If necessary, stack them.
5. Pour 1 cup tomato sauce and 1 cup water over the peppers (you could use 2 cups of salsa instead of the sauce and water if desired).
6. Cook on low for 6-8 hours. Additional sauce can be heated for serving with the peppers.
Happy Cooking
